title: They Might've Hit a UFO With Their Rocket!
summary: This brief clip discusses an experiment at Skinwalker Ranch where researchers launched a rocket equipped with GPS sensors and chalk to detect invisible objects in the air. The rocket allegedly made an unexplained westward deflection, and cameras captured a UFO appearing and disappearing at the same time as the launch.

acronyms.definition: Satellite-based navigation system used here to track the rocket's trajectory
An unidentified aerial object observed in the sky

key_claims.claim: An invisible force at Skinwalker Ranch tampers with equipment used to measure phenomena in the region
A 15-foot rocket equipped with GPS sensors and chalk was launched to map and coat invisible objects hovering above the ranch
The rocket made an abrupt deflection westward as if avoiding something, with no wind to explain the movement
Cameras revealed a UFO entering and exiting the sky at exactly the same time the rocket was launched
The UFO appeared to be provoked by the rocket launch
